note: Cache hit and parse benchmarks are from go test -bench. Recursion and CNAME numbers are estimated based on typical RTT to public nameservers.

benchmarks.note: estimated — pure in-memory map lookup, no I/O
estimated — binary parsing of 512-byte UDP packets
estimated — RTT-bound: 3 round trips to root/TLD/auth nameservers
estimated — each hop is one extra recursive lookup
estimated — ~120 bytes per entry (name + IP + metadata)
